## Player-facing result

What can the player now perceive, decide, or do that they could not before?

## Systems changed

-

## Observable consequences

Describe how the result appears through the world, characters, objects, routines, or environment—not only through explanatory UI.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Acceptance criteria exercised manually
- [ ] Responsive presentation checked when relevant
- [ ] `docs/CURRENT_STATE.md` updated when capabilities changed
- [ ] `docs/DECISIONS.md` updated when a durable decision changed

## Evidence

Screenshots, recordings, test output, or reproduction notes.
